text.title: Structured Logging as Code Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Structured Logging as Code end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: define-required-fields
step.action: List required JSON fields; document each with type and source.
step.decision-gate: Reject if list misses ts / level / msg / request_id.

step.name: design-redaction-policy
step.action: For each PII field set policy in {drop, hash, mask}; encode as regex/field rules.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any PII field has no policy.

step.name: wire-trace-correlation
step.action: Inject trace_id + span_id into every request-scoped log; propagate to background workers.
step.output: trace_correlation field set; sample line shown.
step.decision-gate: Reject if request-scoped logs lack trace_id.

step.name: set-per-env-levels
step.action: Codify level matrix; assert via config-test that prod is not DEBUG.

step.name: ship-ci-fixture
step.action: Add a pytest fixture that parses sample log lines, validates JSON Schema, asserts redaction.
step.decision-gate: Reject merges that regress the fixture.
